allow: Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.items?.map\(i=>\({name:i.name, url:i.html_url, desc:i.description, lang:i.language}\)\),null,2\)\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); console.log\('name:', r.name, '| msg:', r.message, '| desc:', r.description, '| lang:', r.language, '| private:', r.private\); }\);")
Bash(node -e "const c=[]; process.stdin.on\('data',d=>c.push\(d\)\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(c.join\(''\)\); r.forEach\(f=>console.log\(f.name\)\); }\);")
